data.reasoningText: The user wants to run their tests with `dotnet test` and generate a TRX report. Let me look at the project structure first and then run the tests.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-3be17b6ea9bc4b3486b601dfeb9d9baa && dotnet test --logger \"trx;LogFileName=TestResults.trx\" 2>&1", "description": "Run dotnet test with TRX logger", "initial_wait": 60}
